tasks.objective: Clone https://github.com/Akshanshkaushal/gitagent-refactor into /tmp/target-repo and refactor the entire codebase: replace callbacks with async/await, add input validation, extract magic strings/numbers to constants, remove dead code/unused imports, add JSDoc comments to exported functions

steps.description: CLI tool is returning 'spawn sh ENOENT' for all commands — the shell environment is unavailable. Attempting to work around by fetching repo content via GitHub API directly.

tasks.failure_reason: The CLI tool requires 'sh' (Unix shell) to execute commands, but 'sh' is not available in this Windows environment (spawn sh ENOENT). Cannot run git clone or any shell commands. The tool works on Unix/Linux systems but not this Windows host.
